recommendations.title: Philomena
recommendations.overview: A woman searches for her adult son, who was taken away from her decades ago when she was forced to live in a convent.

recommendations.title: Chéri
recommendations.overview: The son of a courtesan retreats into a fantasy world after being forced to end his relationship with the older woman who educated him in the ways of love.

recommendations.title: Dangerous Liaisons
recommendations.overview: In 18th century France, Marquise de Merteuil asks her ex-lover Vicomte de Valmont to seduce the future wife of another ex-lover of hers in return for one last night with her. Yet things don’t go as planned.

recommendations.title: High Fidelity
recommendations.overview: After his long-time girlfriend dumps him, a thirty-year-old record store owner seeks to understand why he is unlucky in love while recounting his "top five breakups of all time".

recommendations.title: Victoria & Abdul
recommendations.overview: Queen Victoria strikes up an unlikely friendship with a young Indian clerk named Abdul Karim.

recommendations.title: Dirty Pretty Things
recommendations.overview: An undocumented immigrant finds a human heart in one of the toilets of the west London hotel where he works with other undocumented immigrants.

recommendations.title: Mary Reilly
recommendations.overview: A housemaid falls in love with Dr. Jekyll and his darkly mysterious counterpart, Mr. Hyde.

recommendations.title: My Beautiful Laundrette
recommendations.overview: A young Pakistani Briton manages a rundown laundrette with his lover while dealing with tension in his family, the local Pakistani community, and a persistent mob of skinheads.

recommendations.title: The Grifters
recommendations.overview: A small-time conman has his loyalties torn between his estranged mother and his new girlfriend, both of whom are high-stakes grifters with their own angles to play.

recommendations.title: Florence Foster Jenkins
recommendations.overview: The story of Florence Foster Jenkins, a New York heiress, who dreamed of becoming an opera singer, despite having a terrible singing voice.
